markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Final sync on launch readiness and unblock key tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Launch on Track for Jan 31:** All blockers are handleable, with key progress on billing (Estevão) and workspace invites (Pedro).](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [**Critical UUID Migration:** Jose will migrate the `workspaces` table to UUIDs today, requiring a brief downtime, to unblock brand deduplication and category charts.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [**Onboarding Flow Redesign:** The confusing "Stevie Kim workspace" will be fixed by renaming the workspace to the user's brand during onboarding, creating a more intuitive flow.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
  - [**Billing Strategy Decisions:** A 14-day credit card trial will be implemented, with prompt limits applied at the workspace level to prevent abuse.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)

## Topics

### Onboarding & Workspace Flow

  - [**Problem:** The onboarding flow is disorienting. A user's brand-focused journey ends in a generic "Stevie Kim workspace," creating a disconnect.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** The workspace is created too early in the flow (on email input), before the user provides a brand name.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
  - [**Solution:** Rename the workspace to the user's brand name immediately after it's provided. This is a quick fix that avoids a full re-architecture.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
  - [**Invite Flow Integration:**](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
      - [**Goal:** Streamline the invite acceptance process.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
      - [**New Logic:** During Clerk sync, the system will check for an invite. If one exists, the user is automatically enrolled in that workspace. If not, a new workspace is created.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This removes a friction-filled "accept/ignore" screen, as leaving a workspace is a simpler alternative.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)

### Billing & Payments

  - [**Status:** Estevão has a working billing implementation and is now testing edge cases (trial end, cancellation, upgrade).](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [**Blocker:** The billing implementation is blocked by the `workspaces` table's `bigint` primary key, which conflicts with the `UUID` foreign keys used by the subscription model.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [**Trial Period Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
      - [**Decision:** Implement a 14-day credit card trial.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)
      - [**Abuse Prevention:** To prevent users from creating 1,500 prompts on a trial and then canceling, prompt limits will be applied at the workspace level during the trial.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
  - [**Downgrade Logic (Post-Launch):**](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=2120.0)
      - [**Problem:** When a user downgrades (e.g., from 500 prompts to the 50-prompt free plan), the system must decide which prompts to disable.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=2120.0)
      - [**Decision:** This is a post-launch task. The team will handle initial cases manually to inform the design of an automated job.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=2168.0)
  - [**Customer Handling:**](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=2263.0)
      - [**Current Customers:** Will remain on the "unlimited" plan.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=2263.0)
      - [**New Prospects:** Will be given full access during strategy sprints. A manual "offboarding" process will be used to transition them to a paid plan or remove access.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)

### Technical Blockers & Progress

  - [**UUID Migration (Jose):**](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
      - [**Action:** Migrate the `workspaces` table from `bigint` to `UUID` primary keys.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
      - [**Why:** To resolve a foreign key type mismatch that blocks brand deduplication and category chart fixes.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
      - [**Impact:** This is a non-trivial migration that will cause a brief downtime. Jose will coordinate the timing to avoid demos.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**New Prompt Display (Pedro):**](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
      - [**Problem:** New prompts have no trend data, but the current UI shows misleading empty trend lines.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
      - [**Solution:** Display an empty state message ("Hold on for data") instead of a chart.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
      - [**UI Decision:** New prompts will be shown in a separate section above the main table, with a toggle to hide/show them.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Implementation:** Use two separate queries (one for prompts with data, one without) to simplify front-end rendering.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [**Workspace Invites (Pedro):**](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
      - [**Status:** PR is reviewed and nearly complete.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jose:**](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
      - [Coordinate and execute the `workspaces` table UUID migration today.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
      - [Ship brand deduplication and category chart fixes after the migration.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [**Pedro:**](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
      - [Complete the workspace invites feature.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
      - [Implement the new prompt display logic (empty state, separate section).](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [**Estevão:**](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
      - [Finalize billing implementation and testing.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
      - [Create a single PR for billing and paywalls, targeting Monday for completion.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)
  - [**Stevie:**](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)
      - [Confirm the 14-day credit card trial with Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=2069.0)
      - [Add terms and conditions to the Stripe setup.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)
      - [Take on small UI/UX tickets this weekend.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [**Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=2120.0)
      - [Create a ticket for the post-launch downgrade logic.](https://fathom.video/share/-yrBd6sPx-s7BiYeJbDFwYALDNNxKJ5C?tab=summary&timestamp=2120.0)
